Do not post real secrets, credentials, private hostnames, user IDs, customer details, or operational procedures in this template. If the finding is sensitive, report it privately using the contact in `SECURITY.md`.

## Area reviewed

Which file, component family, or documentation section are you reviewing?

## Concern

Describe the concern at a high level without exposing sensitive values.

## Recommended next step

Describe the private follow-up or sanitization action you recommend.
